title: Parse describe-instances With jq
description:
## Mine the CLI Output

Automating AWS means parsing JSON from the CLI. A captured **`aws ec2 describe-instances`** output is at **`/root/instances.json`** (Reservations → Instances, each with a `State.Name`).

**Your task:** using **`jq`**, count how many instances are in the **`running`** state and write just the number to **`/root/running.txt`**.

> 💡 Flatten across reservations with `.Reservations[].Instances[]`, filter with `select(.State.Name == "running")`, collect into an array, and take `length`.

hints.title: Flatten, filter, count
hints.body: Iterate every instance across all reservations, keep the running ones, and count them.

validation.description: Checks that /root/running.txt contains the count of running instances (2).
